form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.35) at Sandown in a Grade 4/5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and three places from nine starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (30.35) at Sandown in a Grade 4/5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and three places from nine starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 435m at this track (24.10), beating Chavero. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 435m at this track (24.10), beating Chavero. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on February 24 at Warragul over 400m. Last start was second over 435m in 24.14, behind Daddy Cool. Has a strong record from box 3, including two wins. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working his way into winning form after his success on February 24 at Warragul over 400m. Last start was second over 435m in 24.14, behind Daddy Cool. Has a strong record from box 3, including two wins. Go close.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at the last two runs, both at Sandown, the latest when beaten 6 lengths behind Paw Carver over 515m. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at the last two runs, both at Sandown, the latest when beaten 6 lengths behind Paw Carver over 515m. Hard to recommend this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped, was severely checked and fell.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 460m. Last start finished 2nd over 515m at Sandown beaten 0.8 lengths (29.60) behind He's Magic in a Grade 5 on April 9. Broke a three-start winning streak with the placing last time. Can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 460m. Last start finished 2nd over 515m at Sandown beaten 0.8 lengths (29.60) behind He's Magic in a Grade 5 on April 9. Broke a three-start winning streak with the placing last time. Can bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in home turn.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (29.94) in a Mix 3/4, finishing a 7 length eighth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (29.94) in a Mix 3/4, finishing a 7 length eighth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Fell in home straight.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors five starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.74) at Warragul over 400m. Capable of improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors five starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.74) at Warragul over 400m. Capable of improvement.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Mighty Scar at Warragul last start over 460m (26.28). Has to be respected.
